artPrompt: Single cinematic comic page, no text. Night camp: Elara shares waybread with a lost child; soft egg glow; amber fire; distant cyan rift hairline. Emotional, warm. Original Riftwilds IP only. NO dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, or UI in the image.

lines.text: She shared waybread with a child who had lost a name.

lines.speaker: Elara Venn
lines.text: Call the creature yours to keep — not yours to own.
CODEX ECHO — Waybread on the First Night
